vllm.title: [Bugfix] Update Dockerfile.cpu to fix NameError: name 'vllm_ops' is not defined
vllm.author: LetianLee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The current directory /workspace/vllm has issues importing Python packages, such as from vllm import vllm_ops. Setting the outer directory /workspace/ as WORKDIR resolves these import errors.
FIX [Bug]: CPU Inference vllm_ops not defined #4275 (#4275)



 PR Checklist (Click to Expand) 
Thank you fo

vllm.title: [Core][1/N] Support PP PyNCCL Groups
vllm.author: andoorve
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds supports multiple PP groups. Will help #4412 support CUDAGraph.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Initial Activation Quantization Support
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Initial support for Activation Quantization (specifically static-per tensor for W8A8)
Adds CompressedTensorsConfig and CompressedTensorsLinearMethod to support models quantized through sparseml and saved through compressed-tensors
Adds a new optional layer_name parameter to create_weights.

vllm.title: [Core]: Option To Use Prompt Token Ids Inside Logits Processor
vllm.author: kezouke
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #4928
UPD (based on comment):
This pull request introduces the option to include prompt token IDs in the logits processor functions.
The updated file vllm/model_executor/layers/logits_processor.py now allows the logits processor to handle either two or three arguments.  The choice of arguments p
